arts.ttl: Milan’s Summer Strategy: Jorge Mendes Paves the Way for Antonio Silva
arts.sum: AC Milan's transfer market activities have been significantly influenced by super-agent Jorge Mendes, whose impact is set to continue into the summer. After successfully orchestrating the arrivals of Sergio Conceicao and Joao Felix to the Rossoneri, Mendes is now focusing on his next big move: bringing Antonio Silva to Milan. The post Milan’s Summer Strategy: Jorge Mendes Paves the Way for Antonio Silva appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: OFFICIAL: Joao Felix Joins AC Milan On Loan
arts.sum: AC Milan have officially secured the services of Portuguese forward Joao Felix on loan from Chelsea FC. The deal, which has been in the works for some time, was finalized today, marking a significant addition to the Rossoneri squad. The post OFFICIAL: Joao Felix Joins AC Milan On Loan appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Chelsea forward Joao Felix joins AC Milan on loan for rest of season
arts.sum: The deal with the Serie A side includes a £5m loan fee and does not come with an obligation to buy.

arts.ttl: Chelsea transfer news: AC Milan confirm Joao Felix signing, what shirt number will he wear?
arts.sum: Chelsea and AC Milan confirm that a deal has been finalised for Joao Felix to move to San Siro on loan.

arts.ttl: Roma looking to chop off Real Madrid at the head
arts.sum: Roma are hoping to lure the Real Madrid manager by appealing to his deep connection with the club. As a player, Ancelotti was a key figure for Roma from 1979 to 1987, making 227 appearances, scoring 17 goals, and winning four Coppa Italia titles along with a historic Scudetto .
